name: happyskills
description: HappySkills — install, list, update, and manage AI agent skills locally. Entry point for the HappySkills skill family (depends on design, publish, sync, search, help).

capabilities.summary: install skills and their dependencies into a project
intents: add a skill to my project
get a skill from the registry
install a skill with all its dependencies

capabilities.summary: uninstall skills from the local project (not from the registry)
intents: remove a skill from my project
get rid of an installed skill
prune a skill I no longer use

capabilities.summary: list installed skills and check whether they are up to date
intents: what skills do I have installed
check if my skills are up to date
are there updates available for my skills

capabilities.summary: upgrade installed skills to newer versions
intents: upgrade a skill to the latest version

capabilities.summary: enable or disable installed skills without uninstalling them
intents: disable a skill without uninstalling it
temporarily switch a skill on or off

capabilities.summary: sign in, sign out, and check the current account
intents: which account and workspaces am I in

capabilities.summary: read and change the settings of an installed skill (its config values and where its secrets live)
intents: what is this skill set to
set a skill's channel or model or theme
where do this skill's secrets go

capabilities.summary: set up the HappySkills family, update the CLI, and configure defaults and target agents
intents: choose which agent clients to target

capabilities.summary: capture and restore skill state as a safety net before risky changes
intents: back up a skill before changing it
save the current state of a skill
restore a skill to an earlier state

npm.description: npm package manager (ships with Node.js, used to invoke npx happyskills)

install.darwin: Ships with Node.js — install via brew install node
install.linux: Ships with Node.js — install via nvm
install.win32: Ships with Node.js — install via winget install OpenJS.NodeJS
